description_long: This is a high-back executive swivel chair featuring a plush, contoured seat and backrest upholstered in dark leather or leather-like material. The chair has prominent, curved wooden armrests with a polished finish, adding a touch of elegance and contrast to the dark upholstery. The seat and back are generously padded, with visible stitching that creates segmented cushioning for ergonomic support. The base is a five-pointed star made of metal, equipped with smooth-rolling casters for mobility. A central support column, likely adjustable, connects the seat to the base and is finished in metallic silver. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for office or upscale urban environments.
description: A high-back executive swivel chair with dark padded upholstery, curved wooden armrests, and a metal five-star base with casters. The chair combines comfort and elegance, ideal for office or urban settings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, contoured backrest and the full width of the wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's profile, the curve of the backrest, and the shape of the wooden armrest.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the segmented padded seat and backrest, both armrests, and the central support column with the five-star base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the chair's profile, the ergonomic contouring, and the wooden armrest on the right.
attribute_central_support_column: A metallic, cylindrical column with a telescoping design, connecting the seat to the five-star base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured, and padded backrest with segmented stitching and dark leather upholstery, providing ergonomic support.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved wooden armrests with a polished finish, attached to the seat and backrest, providing both support and aesthetic appeal.
